text.title: cap-pacelc-walkthrough Failure Modes
text.summary: Failure modes observed when applying the cap-pacelc-walkthrough methodology. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Author writes only CAP=AP, leaves PACELC unspecified; latency-budget surprise hits prod.
antipattern.fix: Require both cap_mode AND pacelc_mode in every artefact.

antipattern.symptom: Agent claims 'as per RPO doc' without citing the path.
antipattern.fix: Reject; re-run with explicit input list pinned.

antipattern.root-cause: Pressure to avoid naming a single person.

antipattern.symptom: ADR last_reviewed > 180 days, decision still cited.
antipattern.fix: Schedule review; bump last_reviewed and version.
